name: HomeHealthOS
recommendation: CONDITIONALLY RECOMMENDED - Strong market (IAQ monitoring $5-9B, home warranty $10B+, filter market $17B+). 80M+ allergy sufferers as primary audience. No competitor combines monitoring + filter delivery + warranty. Micro-warranty needs partnership (Extend/Tint). Launch app-only MVP, defer hardware to v2. Score: 7.5/10.

features_implemented: Filter Management with countdown timer and order link
Pro Directory with 3 mock HVAC providers
AirScore algorithm (EPA AQI + VOC Index + Humidity)

notes: Phase 3 build COMPLETE. 32+ Swift files compiled successfully (Mac Catalyst verified). FICO score for your home's air. AirScore gauge (hero, 0-1000), Swift Charts history, equipment health, filter countdown, pro directory, micro-warranty, StoreKit 2 paywall ($9.99/mo, $99.99/yr), onboarding. DesignSystem with #06B6D4 accent. EPA AQI algorithm (PM2.5 50% + VOC 30% + Humidity 20%). 168 mock data points.
